open_access_papers.title: A linear transportation Lp distance for pattern recognition
open_access_papers.template_use: Pattern Recognition technical article anatomy, theoretical-method contribution, experimental validation narrative.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not reuse theorem/algorithm language or paper-specific claims.

open_access_papers.title: A too-good-to-be-true prior to reduce shortcut reliance
open_access_papers.template_use: Short-format argument, compact experiment reporting, PRL-style concise contribution packaging.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not copy compact phrasing or the shortcut-learning framing as boilerplate.

open_access_papers.title: Enhancing vessel arrival time prediction: A fusion-based deep learning approach
open_access_papers.template_use: Fusion-based deep learning application framing, applied prediction evaluation, practical decision-support discussion style.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not reuse vessel-arrival, logistics, or dataset-specific claims.

open_access_papers.title: Advanced insights through systematic analysis: Mapping future research directions and opportunities for xAI in deep learning and artificial intelligence used in cybersecurity
open_access_papers.template_use: Neurocomputing survey/analysis structure, research-direction synthesis, technical taxonomy with applied context.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not copy taxonomy, research questions, or field-specific conclusions.

open_access_papers.title: GKF-PUAL: A group kernel-free approach to positive-unlabeled learning with variable selection
open_access_papers.template_use: Information Sciences method naming, algorithmic contribution, variable-selection evaluation, discussion/conclusion balance.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not reuse algorithm naming or variable-selection claims.

open_access_papers.title: Adazd-Net: Automated adaptive and explainable Alzheimer’s disease detection system using EEG signals
open_access_papers.template_use: KBS application/method blend, adaptive/explainable AI framing, biomedical signal validation and limitations.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not copy medical conclusions, EEG figures, adaptive-wavelet claims, or case-study-specific text.

official_templates.title: elsarticle.cls documentation
official_templates.purpose: Elsevier article class and LaTeX submission implementation reference.

policy: Use bundled papers for structural study only. Do not copy text or content.
